description: Style Notelotto comes up with this pair of flip flops for those who love the contemporary laidback lifestyle. These flip flops feature colourful branding on their comfy footbed with heavy duty straps. Wear this with denims rolled up at the cuffs and bright tees.Product DetailsBlunt toed, black coloured flip flops with slip on stylingHas thong straps with toe separatorComfortable footbed with graphic printRed rubber outsole with groovesMaterial and CareRubberWipe with clean wet cloth when required
